twitter_thread: 27 AI tools tested, 22 failed to save us time. $10k down the drain.
5 AI tools that worked: Zapier saved us 8 hours/week, Calendly 4 hours/week, Mailchimp 2 hours/week, Trello 3 hours/week, Otter 1 hour/week.
AI-powered customer service saved us 5 hours/week, but satisfaction dropped 12% due to canned responses.
AI tools claiming 10x gains? Usually 15% at best. We saw 12% gain with Zapier automation.
Custom-built chatbot outperformed pre-made solutions by 30% in handling customer inquiries.
Top mistake: automating without a goal. We wasted 6 weeks automating a non-essential process.
What AI tool has given you the biggest productivity boost in your business? #aitools #productivity
pack.linkedin: I spent $10k testing 27 AI tools for business. Only 5 delivered: Zapier saved us 8 hours/week, Calendly 4 hours/week, Mailchimp 2 hours/week, Trello 3 hours/week, and Otter 1 hour/week. However, AI-powered customer service saved time but decreased satisfaction by 12%. Our custom-built chatbot outperformed pre-made solutions by 30%. What's your experience with AI tools in your business? Have you found any that actually deliver?
tiktok_hooks: I blew $10k on 27 AI tools and found 22 were useless
These 5 AI tools actually saved me time and money
I automated customer service with AI and lost 12% of customer satisfaction
pack.reddit_headline: 27 AI tools tested, 22 failed: what's the worst AI tool you've wasted time on?
